name: Dishoom
blurb: London's cult Bombay café finally lands in NoMad — black dal incoming.

name: Straker's NYC
blurb: TikTok-famous London chef Thomas Straker's butter-forward, British-by-Italy debut in Soho.

name: Ugly Baby (Williamsburg)
blurb: NYC's most-mourned Thai spot revives at a new Williamsburg address — same face-melting heat.

name: Saison
blurb: Sammy Rees's Bed-Stuy corner shop pairs vintage finds with baked goods and coffee — she's been posting construction progress ahead of a birth-month soft open.
